title: Full-Stack Challenge Application - Web & Cloud Project
bullets: Developed a full-stack challenge tracking application designed with a clean, scalable 3-tier architecture.
Built a responsive React user interface that communicates seamlessly with a Java Spring Boot REST API.
Integrated a relational MySQL database with Spring Data JPA for persistent and structured data storage.
Deployed on AWS S3 and EC2, using CloudFront as a unified reverse proxy to natively resolve CORS issues.

title: Environmental sensing with LoRaWAN - PolyU Computing degree FYP
bullets: This is a one-person final year school project in PolyU. This project explores the possibility of developing a cost-effective plant monitoring system to achieve automation of plant monitoring using technologies of LoRaWAN and Arduino.
Implemented the system by following the LoRaWAN architecture (end nodes, gateway, network server, application server)
Implemented functions like login/logout, Two-step verification with email, Live data view, Record Search, CRUD for account and related objects in the project.
Set up domain with Hostinger and database with phpMyAdmin.
Encryption: Encrypts data with AES-256-CBC. Users’ password is hashed with sha256 and salt to protect it during data transfer.
Set up and create webhook to check data, if environmental data exceeding threshold, there will be email notification.

title: E-commerce website - School project
bullets: This is a 4 people school project. An online department store was developed. The website called “The Shop”, customers can buy all kinds of stuff from the website.
Implemented the front end of the customer related parts, including login/logout, product list/search/view/filter/cart
Implemented cart with local storage
Building front-end to send customer request to backend with Https request (Axios) and handle the responses from the backend server
Styling part of the front end with Bootstrap

title: An assessment system for students’ performance on GitHub - School project
bullets: Developed an assessment system that integrates GitHub APIs to retrieve student data, leveraging LLM to analyze performance and generate comprehensive reports.

title: A booking app prototype
bullets: This is a booking app prototype. The app is for the user to book a timeslot of a trading shop to exchange the currency.
Implemented functions like login/logout/signup, booking, and cancel booking.
Fetch API in the backend PHP server to get the latest currency rate set by the shop every few second.

title: Single page website - Internship project
bullets: This is an internship experience to implement the front end of the website to show information of the customer.
Follow Figma UI design wireframe from the designer to modify template to complete a responsive website layout with HTML, JavaScript, Tailwind CSS, and framer motion
Modify animation

title: VR fire training game - IVE Software Engineering FYP
bullets: This is a 4 people final year school project in IVE. This project uses the VR technologies to simulate the fire training.
Implemented the game tools like fire extinguisher and fire sand bucket.
Implemented health system and timer system.
Set up domain with Hostinger and database with phpMyAdmin.
